scripts.build: node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node node_modules/@remix-run/dev/dist/cli.js vite:build
scripts.start: node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy && cross-env HOST=0.0.0.0 node node_modules/@remix-run/serve/dist/cli.js ./build/server/index.js
scripts.setup: node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy
